versions.version_description: This is a simpler song than the previously accepted versions seem to demonstrate, yet everyone left out the E7 in the last phrase of the chorus, left out lyrics or added chords that aren't there. In this version, not only are the chors and lyrics correct, but the structure is simpler and printable for those that want this in their repertoire.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
*Note: This is how I think the song is played and this is how I play it*


[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Guess it's true, I'm not good at a one-night stand[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
But I still need love 'cause I'm just a man[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
These nights never seem to go to plan[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I don't want you to leave, will you hold my hand?[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, won't you stay with me?[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause you're all I need[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
This ain't love, it's clear to see[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    
But darling, stay with me[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Why am I so emotional?[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
No, it's not a good look, gain some self-control[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
And deep down I know this never works[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
But you can lay with me so it doesn't hurt[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, won't you stay with me?[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause you're all I need[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
This ain't love, it's clear to see[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]    
But darling, stay with me[/tab]


[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Oh. . . . .[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Oh. . . . .[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Oh. . . . .[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Mmm Mmm. . . .[/tab]



              Am*   F*   C*
Oh, won't you stay with me?

               F* Dm* C*
'Cause you're all I need

            Am*        F*       C*
This ain't love, it's clear to see

      G*      F*  Dm*  C    
But darling, stay with me
